name: Lucrative Opportunity
description: A unique Eridian relic focused on vendor utility rather than combat. It speeds up vending machine restock timers, so it is mildly useful for shop-farming routes that rely on waiting instead of save-quit resets.
notes:
It is awarded during Safe and Sound if you hand the incriminating photos of Moxxi to Marcus.

The relic resembles a pair of coins, matching its money-focused theme.

special.description: Cuts vending machine restock time, speeding up the shop timer. For most farming routes, save-quit resets are still faster.

abilities: Causes shop timers to count down faster.
